conflict: Kem's revulsion at the Hoarded lifestyle and his father's visible deterioration into Stillness
consequence: Kem breaks from the Hoarded; free, incompetent, and dropping fast
must_land_beats: The Conservatory Rite — the Hoarded philosophy of inaction performed as ritual
Lord Aldraste's Stillness: the cost of never acting, rendered physically
Kem's first ability use — absurdly overpowered for opening a door
Kem's immediate incompetence outside the Vault: Sustenance Charm that feeds forty
Kem takes the House signet from the ceremonial stand by the gate — not because he wants it, but because leaving it would mean he'd thought this through
Kem passes the sealed wing the Hoarded never discuss — a different quality of silence
pressure_source: Kem's revulsion at the Hoarded lifestyle and his father's visible deterioration into Stillness
secondary_character_beats: Lady Aldraste says Kem's name once as he leaves — maternal feeling compressed into a single word

setups_to_plant.description: Lord Aldraste's deterioration from level-300 preservation — the Hoarded philosophy has a physical cost they refuse to name
Brief reference in Kem's awareness of the Vault — a wing or quarter the Hoarded never discuss, where certain people are permitted to spend
